name: Weedy's World
short_description: Weedy's World is a one or two-player game set in a U.P. Michigan dispensary called Glazed & Confused, players navigate a cannabis maze as Weedy or Ms. Weedy, collecting pot leaves and using power-ups while avoiding aliens. Inspired by Pac-Man, the game adds a unique twist with 420-themed humor.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Weedy's World, an exhilarating local multiplayer game immersed in the vibrant universe of Glazed and Confused, a real-life business nestled in the Upper Peninsula of Crystal Falls, Michigan. In this immersive experience, players step into the shoes of Weedy or Ms. Weedy, embarking on a thrilling quest to gather pot leaves and unlock powerful bongs to thwart invading aliens.

As the game unfolds, players are treated to captivating short story cinematics that unveil the dramatic events surrounding Ms. Weedy's abduction by aliens. Will you join Weedy in the fight against these otherworldly foes and rescue Ms. Weedy from their clutches? Dive into Weed's World and discover the adventure that awaits!"
